content: We can frame the original task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a base architecture that can be structurally enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement pipeline that still retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision. This pipeline lets an LLM challenge its own initial output from disjoint problem-solving angles, rather than only refining along the same single perspective it used to generate the original output.
